Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Guns 'n' Ghosts (Psytronik - 2013).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0a00 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Guns 'n' Ghosts (Psytronik - 2013).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0900 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
